type: PROPOSE

note: My feature adds resolve_*_with_size() variants to ImageBlock/AudioBlock/DocumentBlock in types.py. This is the only file I need to touch. Let me know your files so we can confirm disjoint or coordinate on types.py if you need it too.

type: REVISE

I won't add/remove any methods or touch resolve_*_with_size. To avoid clobbering, I'll go first and send DONE when finished (should be quick); please wait for my DONE before editing, then rebase your new resolve_*_with_size methods on top of my version. OK?

I'll only ADD new methods resolve_image_with_size/resolve_audio_with_size/resolve_document_with_size placed immediately after each existing method, without touching their existing lines. This keeps our diffs non-overlapping. OK?
